title: Dhammapada, Chapter 24: Craving
description: Chapter 24 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 24 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: When a person lives heedlessly, craving grows in him like a creeping vine. He runs from life to life like a monkey seeking fruit in a forest.
